rationale: The citing paper focuses on how a “via mobile” review cue affects perceived effort/credibility and purchase intentions in WOM, while the cited paper studies geo-conquesting SMS discounts and cannibalization in location-based promotions—substantially different constructs and empirical context. In the citing note, mobile promotion/advertising work is positioned as prior background that this study moves beyond, and the match evidence is only a DOI with no sign of direct method/theory use.
